title: oncidium × kraenzlinii
intro: Oncidium × kraenzlinii, also known as the Kraenzlin's oncidium, is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the Oncidium genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to the presence of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of Oncidium × kraenzlinii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
